item.title: PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious mea...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals I’ve ever madeIngredients-Dungess Crab -Salmon Roe (optional)-Shallot-Garlic-Lemon-Parsley-Basil-Calabrian chili or chili flakes -Butter-Dry white wine-Bucatini, spaghetti, or linguini-Burrata (optional)RECIPE-Break down your crab: cutting off the sharp tips of the leps, removing the belly flap, separating the body and the top shell -Scrape out and save the tomalley (“crab mustard” -Discard mandibles and gills, remove claws -Crack the claw pieces -Boil the crab for approximately 7 minutes -Remove the crab from water, let cool -Crack open the shell and remove the crab meat, set aside-Mince shallot, garlic, and parsley-Sauté ingredients in extra virgin olive oil until translucent-Add Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional) with butter-Add dry white wine, cook it down-Cook your pasta-Add al dente pasta, cooked crab, lemon juice + zest-Emulsify the ingredients with reserved pasta waterPlate and serve! Add burrata and salmon roe for extra depth #food #cibo #italian #fusion #pasta #burrata #salmon

item.title: Moussaka 🍆🍅 One of my new favorite comfort meals Ingredien...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Moussaka 🍆🍅 One of my new favorite comfort meals IngredientsFor the Meat Sauce-Extra virgin olive oil-Onion-Garlic cloves-Ground lamb or beef-Sea salt-Black pepper-Ground cinnamon-Ground allspice-Ground nutmeg-Tomato paste-Crushed tomatoes-Dry red wine-Bay leafFor the Vegetables-Eggplants-Salt-Oil*note: you can also use potatoes in moussakaFor the Béchamel Sauce-Unsalted butter-All-purpose flour-Whole milk, warmed-Sea salt-Black pepper-Ground nutmeg-Kefalotyri or Parmesan cheese, grated-Egg yolkTo finish-Kefalotyri or Parmesan cheese

A Day In My Life🤓! I wanted to share a glimpse into what I do outside of the cooking videos! Also because my abuela was curious #losangeles

item.title: Drinking better: Ranch Water using @nosotros A clean, simple, an...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Drinking better: Ranch Water using @nosotros A clean, simple, and refreshing drinkIngredients2 oz tequila blanco ½ oz fresh lime juice Sparkling mineral water IceLime (juice and garnish) #nosotrospartner

item.title: GNOCCHI ALLA SORRENTINA 🍅INGREDIENTS-Yukon gold or russet pot...
item.description:
View on Instagram


GNOCCHI ALLA SORRENTINA 🍅INGREDIENTS-Yukon gold or russet potatoes-00’ or AP flour -1 Egg-Garlic-Basil (+ stems for cooking)-Fresh tomatoes-Passata or crushed San Marzano tomatoes-Salt & Pepper-EVOO#cooking #gnocchi #comfortfood

item.title: RATATOUILLE 👩‍🍳 Also known as Confit Biyaldi Ingredients...
item.description:
View on Instagram


RATATOUILLE 👩‍🍳 Also known as Confit Biyaldi Ingredients For the sauce:-Bell peppers -Onion-Garlic-Tomatoes (peeled)-Salt -Thyme -Rosemary -Extra virgin olive oilFor the layering: -Eggplant-Roma tomatoes -Zucchini-Yellow Squash -Salt (after slicing the vegetables, cure them with salt to remove excess water) -Black pepper-Thyme-Extra virgin olive oil Plated with more of the sauce, parsley, and a chive. Inspired by @pixar ‘s film Ratatouille☺️#cooking #disney #ratatouille #recipe #food

item.title: Chimichurri Steak Sandwich 🥩 I need wider bread…For the Chi...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Chimichurri Steak Sandwich 🥩 I need wider bread…For the Chimichurri-Parsley-Cilantro-Red peppers (I used cherry bomb because that’s all they had haha)-Red chili flakes-Garlic-Oregano (fresh or dry)-Red wine vinegar-Juice of a fresh lemon-Extra Virgin Olive Oil-Salt -Black pepper For the Steak-Flat iron, ribeye, or skirt steak (really whatever you are feeling)-Avocado oil -Salt-Black pepper-Butter-Garlic-Rosemary -ThymeFor the shoestring fries-Russet potatoes-Neutral frying oil (ie: avocado oil, vegetable oil) -Salt Cilantro Sauce-Mayonnaise-Garlic-Cilantro-Green chili -Juice of a lime (more if needed to combine)-Extra virgin olive oil -Salt/pepper to taste Assembly: -Ciabatta, Baguette, or Bolillo are good options. l recommend a wider bread than I selected-Arugula Enjoy! #cooking #chimichurri #recipe #steaksandwich

item.title: WONTONS AND SICHUAN CHILI CRISP 🥟 🌶️Ingredients For the ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


WONTONS AND SICHUAN CHILI CRISP 🥟 🌶️Ingredients For the Wontons: -Ground pork (can sub other meats as well!)-Shrimp-Soy Sauce-Shaoxing wine-Oyster sauce-Sesame oil-Pinch of sugar-MSG (optional)-Salt-White pepper-Grated garlic-Grated ginger-Green onion-Wonton wrappers For the Sichuan Chili Crisp-Neutral oil (ie: avocado oil, peanut oil)-Shallots-Garlic-Ginger-Sichuan peppercorns-Red chilli powder-Chinese 5 spice -Gochugaru -Star anise-Cinnamon sticks-Peanuts-Soy sauce-Rice wine vinegar (optional add in black vinegar)-Sugar or honey-Salt-MSG-Sesame seeds #dumplings #sichuan #cooking

item.title: Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice made with @chosenfoods avocado oil. One o...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Spicy Tuna Crispy Rice made with @chosenfoods avocado oil. One of my favorite dishes to order at restaurants but it’s simple to make at home! IngredientsFor the Crispy Rice2 cups sushi rice2 ½ cups water2 tbsp rice vinegar1 tbsp sugar1 tsp saltKombuChosen Foods Avocado Oil Spray (for greasing & crisping)For the Spicy Tuna Sushi-grade tuna, finely dicedChosen Foods Avocado Oil MayoSriracha (or to taste)Soy sauce1 tsp toasted sesame seeds and/or ground sesame1 tsp fresh lime (juice)Green onionGarnishesFresh avocado slicesJalapeño Sesame seeds*Cilantro would also work well here! #ChosenPartner

item.title: Beetroot Risotto with Scallops 💕 Happy Valentine’s Day! Ing...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Beetroot Risotto with Scallops 💕 Happy Valentine’s Day! Ingredients-Red beets-Shallot-Mushrooms of choice, I used an assortment!-Garlic-Sage-Thyme-Lemon-Scallops-Butter (I also used a homemade herb compound butter to baste the scallops)-Arborio or Rice-Vegetable or Chicken Stock-Extra virgin olive oil-White wine -Parmigiano Reggiano -Salt-Black pepper#valentinesday #risotto #italianfood #cooking #dinnerrecipe

item.title: Korean fried chicken sandwich 🍗🤤 Who are you rooting for i...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Korean fried chicken sandwich 🍗🤤 Who are you rooting for in the Super Bowl?IngredientsFor the chicken-Boneless, skinless chicken thighs-Buttermilk-Gochujang-Kimchi juice-Garlic powder-Onion Powder-Salt-PepperFor the breading-AP Flour-Cornstarch-Baking powder-Paprika-Garlic powder-Salt-Black pepper-Frying oil For the gochujang sauce-Gochujang-Honey-Soy sauce-Vinegar-Sesame oil-Grated garlic-Grated ginger For the slaw-Green and purple cabbage-Carrots-Rice vinegar-Sesame oil-Salt-Sesame seedsFor the Sandwich -Brioche buns-Spicy gochujang mayo -green onion#cooking #friedchicken #superbowl #sandwich #koreanfriedchicken
